Place oil in blast chiller while preparing other ingredients.
In 22qt cambro, add mustard, honey, lemon juice, sushi vinegar, salt and pepper
Using a large immersion blender, blend until smooth.
Add cheese to puree with mustard mixture
Add water to loosen mixture while adding in cheese and maintain emulsion.
Once everything is combined, begin emulsifying the cold oil into the mixture in a small stream
Sauce should be thick to coat and show no bubbling on the back of a spoon (nape)
Reserve in quart containers and store in the cooler
